rationale: The cited paper appears in the citing article's future-research applications section (Table 7) as an illustrative example of prior text-based language findings on assertive tone and behavior. It is used to suggest a possible domain where PARA could be applied, not to build PARA's core theory, measurement framework, algorithm design, or empirical validation. The main foundations and validation tests in the citing paper rely on other sources (especially the textual paralanguage framework and text-analytics benchmarks), so this citation functions as background/example only.
